python collect_mappo_distill_data.py --checkpoint /home/danielmasamba/projects/pursuit/mappo_results/PPO_2025-09-02_22-27-57/PPO_pursuit_env_fc9d2_00000_0_2025-09-02_22-27-58/checkpoint_000079 --out_dir distill_data --episodes 500 --n-pursuers 2 --n-evaders 1 --x-size 8 --y-size 8 --max-cycles 100 --freeze-evaders --vector-envs 1

python collect_mappo_distill_data_val.py \
  --out_dir val_fixed_5k \
  --x_size 8 --y_size 8 --n_pursuers 2 --n_evaders 1 \
  --max_cycles 100 --freeze_evaders --n_catch 2 \
  --env_seeds 101,102,103,104,105,106,107,108,109,110 \
  --episodes 600 \
  --every_k_steps 2 --dedup \
  --balance_actions --per_action_cap 1200 \
  --deterministic --store_logits \
  --rllib_checkpoint /home/danielmasamba/projects/pursuit/mappo_results/PPO_2025-09-02_22-27-57/PPO_pursuit_env_fc9d2_00000_0_2025-09-02_22-27-58/checkpoint_000079 \
  --policy_id default_policy \
  --target_count 5000 --progress_every 100
